Export.Routine: DVPXDG ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Patient Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DGCV 4156 ; DGMSTAPI 2716 ; DGNTAPI 3457 ; DGRPDB 4807 ; DILFD 2055 ; DIQ 2056 ; IBBAPI 6391 ; MPIF001 2701 ; ORWPT 3292 ; SCAPMC 1916 ; SCAPMCA 2848 ; VADPT 10061 ; VAFCTFU1 2990 ; VASITE 10112 ; DVPUTL ; XUAF4 2171 Q ; GETPAT(SOURCE,TARGET) ; Get Patient Demographics N ERR,PAT,X,CNT,VALUE,DFN,ICN,FNAME,LNAME,LAST4SSN,FULLSSN,DVPSITE,DVPSTN,patientId S ERR="",CNT=0 N X F X="patientId","DFN" D INITPARM^DVPUTL(.X) S ICN=patientId S DVPSITE=$$SITE^VASITE,DVPSTN=$P(DVPSITE,U,3) I DFN="",ICN="" D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Patient Identifier is required.","GETPAT^DVPXDG") I DFN="",ICN]"" S DFN=$$GETDFN^MPIF001(ICN) I +DFN<1 D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"No patient found for ICN","GETPAT^DVPXDG") I DFN,ICN="" S ICN=$$GETICN^MPIF001(DFN) I '$D(^DPT(DFN,0)) D Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() . D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(1,"Patient DFN is undefined","GETPAT^DVPXDG") S X=$$GET1^DIQ(38.1,DFN_",",2,"I") S:$L(X) PAT("sensitive")=$S(X:"true",1:"false") ; Kill the VADPT variables D KVAR^VADPT,KVA^VADPT ; N KEY,I,J,K,X,VADM,VAPA N X,DVPID S PAT("active")="true" ; Set ICN identifier N X S X="official^enterprise^MVI^"_ICN_"^^^Department of Veterans Affairs" N DVPID D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.DVPID,X) I $D(DVPID)>1 M PAT("identifier",1)=DVPID ; ; Set DFN identifier N X S X="official^local^VAMC^"_DFN_"^^^"_$P($$SITE^VASITE,U,2) N DVPID D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.DVPID,X) I $D(DVPID)>1 M PAT("identifier",2)=DVPID ; D 4^VADPT ; Name N DVPNAME D NAME^DVPXUTL(.DVPNAME,"usual^"_VADM(1)_"^^") I $D(DVPNAME)>1 M PAT("name")=DVPNAME ; ; Address N X S X="home^physical^"_VAPA(1)_U_VAPA(2)_U_VAPA(3)_U_VAPA(4)_U_$P(VAPA(7),U,2) S X=X_U_$P(VAPA(5),U,2)_U_VAPA(6)_U_$P(VAPA(25),U,2)_"^^" N DVPADD D ADDRESS^DVPXUTL(.DVPADD,X) I $D(DVPADD)>1 M PAT("address")=DVPADD ; ; SSN Identifier N X S X="official^ssn^USSSA^"_$P(VADM(2),U,2)_"^^^United States Social Security Administration" N DVPID D IDENT^DVPXUTL(.DVPID,X) I $D(DVPID)>1 M PAT("identifier",3)=DVPID ; ; Home Phone N X S X="phone"_U_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(VAPA(8))_"^home^1^^" N DVPPHN D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.DVPPHN,X) I $D(DVPPHN)>1 M PAT("telecom","homePhone")=DVPPHN ; ; Mobile Phone N X S X="phone"_U_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL($$GET1^DIQ(2,DFN_",",.134))_"^mobile^^^" N DVPPHN D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.DVPPHN,X) I $D(DVPPHN)>1 M PAT("telecom","mobilePhone")=DVPPHN ; ; Work Phone N X S X="phone"_U_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL($$GET1^DIQ(2,DFN_",",.132))_"^work^^^" N DVPPHN D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.DVPPHN,X) I $D(DVPPHN)>1 M PAT("telecom","workPhone")=DVPPHN ; ; Email Address N X S X="email"_U_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL($$GET1^DIQ(2,DFN_",",.133))_"^primary^^^" N DVPPHN D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.DVPPHN,X) I $D(DVPPHN)>1 M PAT("telecom","email")=DVPPHN ; ; Gender N DVPGEN D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPGEN,VADM(5)) I $D(DVPGEN)>1 M PAT("gender")=DVPGEN ; ; Birth Date S PAT("birthDate")=$P(VADM(3),U,2) ; Death Indicator I VADM(6)]"" S PAT("deceasedBoolean")="true",PAT("deceasedDateTime")=$P(VADM(6),U,2) E S PAT("deceasedBoolean")="false" ; ; Marital Status N DVPMAR,CODE,X S X=$P($G(^DIC(11,+VADM(10),0)),"^",3) S CODE=$S(X="N":"S",X="S":"L",X="U":"UNK",1:X) D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPMAR,CODE_U_$P(VADM(10),U,2)) I $D(DVPMAR)>1 M PAT("maritalStatus")=DVPMAR ; ; Multiple Birth Boolean (multipleBirthInteger is not supported) N DVPMBI S DVPMBI=$$GET1^DIQ(2,DFN_",",994) S PAT("multipleBirthBoolean")=$S(DVPMBI="Y":"true",1:"false") ; ; Communication / Languages N DVPLANG,CODE S CODE=$$GET1^DIQ(.85,+$G(VADM(13,1))_",",.03) D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPLANG,CODE_U_$P(VADM(13,1),U,2)) I $D(DVPLANG)>1 D . M PAT("communication","language")=DVPLANG . S PAT("communication","language","preferred")="true" ; ;-support contacts ; Kill the VADPT variables D KVAR^VADPT,KVA^VADPT N VAOA,A,I,X,TYPE ; Primary Next of Kin. Code=N D OAD^VADPT S TYPE="nextOfKin" N DVPCON D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPCON,"N^"_TYPE) I $D(DVPCON)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"relationship")=DVPCON ; Name N DVPNAME D NAME^DVPXUTL(.DVPNAME,"usual^"_VAOA(9)_"^^") I $D(DVPNAME)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"name")=DVPNAME ; Phone N X S X="phone"_U_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(VAOA(8))_"^home^^^" N DVPPHN D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.DVPPHN,X) I $D(DVPPHN)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"telecom")=DVPPHN ; Address N X S X="home^physical^"_VAOA(1)_U_VAOA(2)_U_VAOA(3)_U_VAOA(4)_U_$P(VAOA(7),U,2) S X=X_U_$P(VAOA(5),U,2)_U_VAOA(6)_U_"US^^" N DVPADD D ADDRESS^DVPXUTL(.DVPADD,X) I $D(DVPADD)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"address")=DVPADD ; Gender N DVPGEN D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPGEN,"UNK^UNKNOWN") I $D(DVPGEN)>1 M PAT("gender")=DVPGEN ; ; Primary Emergency Contact. Code=C K VAOA S VAOA("A")=1 D OAD^VADPT S TYPE="emergency" N DVPCON D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPCON,"C^"_TYPE) I $D(DVPCON)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"relationship")=DVPCON ; Name N DVPNAME D NAME^DVPXUTL(.DVPNAME,"usual^"_VAOA(9)_"^^") I $D(DVPNAME)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"name")=DVPNAME ; Phone N X S X="phone"_U_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(VAOA(8))_"^home^^^" N DVPPHN D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.DVPPHN,X) I $D(DVPPHN)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"telecom")=DVPPHN ; Address N X S X="home^physical^"_VAOA(1)_U_VAOA(2)_U_VAOA(3)_U_VAOA(4)_U_$P(VAOA(7),U,2) S X=X_U_$P(VAOA(5),U,2)_U_VAOA(6)_U_"US^^" N DVPADD D ADDRESS^DVPXUTL(.DVPADD,X) I $D(DVPADD)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"address")=DVPADD ; Gender N DVPGEN D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPGEN,"UNK^UNKNOWN") I $D(DVPGEN)>1 M PAT("gender")=DVPGEN ; ; Employer. Code=E K VAOA S VAOA("A")=5 D OAD^VADPT S TYPE="employer" N DVPCON D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPCON,"E^"_TYPE) I $D(DVPCON)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"relationship")=DVPCON ; Purpose N DVPPURP D CODE^DVPXUTL(.DVPPURP,"PATINF^Patient") I $D(DVPPURP)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"organization","contact","purpose")=DVPPURP ; Name N DVPNAME D NAME^DVPXUTL(.DVPNAME,"usual^"_VAOA(9)_"^^") I $D(DVPNAME)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"organization","contact","name")=DVPNAME ; Phone N X S X="phone"_U_$$FORMAT^DVPXUTL(VAOA(8))_"^home^^^" N DVPPHN D TELECOM^DVPXUTL(.DVPPHN,X) I $D(DVPPHN)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"organization","telecom")=DVPPHN ; Address N X S X="home^physical^"_VAOA(1)_U_VAOA(2)_U_VAOA(3)_U_VAOA(4)_U_$P(VAOA(7),U,2) S X=X_U_$P(VAOA(5),U,2)_U_VAOA(6)_U_"US^^" N DVPADD D ADDRESS^DVPXUTL(.DVPADD,X) I $D(DVPADD)>1 M PAT("contact",TYPE,"organization","address")=DVPADD ; ; General Practitioner ; ***TODO*** ; Managing Organization ; ***TODO*** M @TARGET@("results","patient")=PAT Q $$RESULT^DVPUTL() ; ALIAS ;-other names used N I,X S I=0 F S I=$O(^DPT(DFN,.01,I)) Q:I<1 S X=$P($G(^(I,0)),U) D . S PAT("alias",I)=X_U_$P(X,",")_U_$P(X,",",2,99) Q FAC ;-treating facilities [see FACLIST^ORWCIRN] N IFN S DFN=+$G(DFN) Q:DFN<1 N DVPY,HOME,LAST,I,X,IEN I $L($T(TFL^VAFCTFU1)) D TFL^VAFCTFU1(.DVPY,DFN) S HOME=+$P($G(^DPT(DFN,"MPI")),U,3) ;home facility I $P($G(DVPY(1)),U)<0 D Q ;not setup . S X=$O(^AUPNVSIT("AA",DFN,0)),LAST=$S(X:9999999-$P(X,"."),1:"") . S X=$$SITE^VASITE . S PAT("facility",+X)=$P(X,U,3)_U_$P(X,U,2)_U_LAST_U_$$GET1^DIQ(4,+X_",",60) S I=0 F S I=$O(DVPY(I)) Q:I<1 D . S X=DVPY(I) Q:$P(X,U)="" ;unknown . S IEN=+$$IEN^XUAF4($P(X,U)) . I +X=776!(+X=200) S $P(X,U,2)="DEPT. OF DEFENSE" . S PAT("facility",IEN)=$P(X,U,1,2)_U_$P($P(X,U,3),".") . ; = stn# ^ name ^ last date ^ VistA domain . S $P(PAT("facility",IEN),U,4)=$$GET1^DIQ(4,IEN_",",60) . I IEN=HOME S $P(PAT("facility",IEN),U,5)=1 Q PC ;-primary care N TEAM,DVPPC,I,X,FAC,ST S TEAM=$$INSTPCTM^SCAPMC(DFN) Q:'TEAM ;teamIEN^name^instIEN^name S PAT("pcTeam")=$P(TEAM,U,1,2) D GETALL^SCAPMCA(DFN,,.DVPPC) S I=+$O(@DVPPC@(DFN,"TM",+TEAM,0)),X=$G(^(I)) S:$P(X,U,4) PAT("pcAssigned")=$P(X,U,4) S X=$G(@DVPPC@(DFN,"PCPR",1)) I X D . D PROVIDER^DVPXUTL(.PAT,+X,"pcProvider") . S FAC=$P(TEAM,U,3,4) S:FAC<1 FAC=$$SITE^VASITE . S X=$$PADD^XUAF4(+FAC) ;street^city^st^zip . S ST=$$GET1^DIQ(4,+FAC_",",.02) S:ST="" ST=$P(X,U,3) ;get state name . N DVPADD D ADDRESS^DVPXUTL(.DVPADD,$P(X,U)_"^^^"_$P(X,U,2)_U_ST_U_$P(X,U,4)) . I $D(DVPADD)>1 M PAT("pcProvider","address")=DVPADD K @DVPPC Q
